hook_text: 🌱 'Guess What's ALIVE!' — Today we're going on a treasure hunt! I have a mysterious bag with 6 items. Some are LIVING, some are NOT living. Your job? Be a detective and figure out which ones are alive! But first... can YOU tell me—are YOU living? What about this chair? The sun? Let's find out together! (Holds up a clear bag with: a potted plant, a toy car, a photograph of a dog, a seashell, a silk flower, and a balloon)
materials_needed: Photograph of a dog (non-living, but shows living thing)
Real seashell (was living, now non-living - great discussion!)
Chart paper with 'Living vs Non-Living' headers
